## Documentation and status

- [ ] Product/domain/architecture documents remain accurate
- [ ] Contracts and examples are updated when behavior changes
- [ ] `docs/05-delivery/10-implementation-status.md` is truthful
- [ ] README does not present planned work as completed

## Publication safety

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, local configuration, private prompts, raw research captures, or real business data
- [ ] All demo data is synthetic
- [ ] Generated artifacts are reproducible
